title: segmentation fault on select query among big amount of data
poc: CREATE TABLE mseed_catalog (starttime TIMESTAMP, mseed INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_01 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_02 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_03 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_04 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_05 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_06 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_07 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_08 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_09 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_10 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_11 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_12 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata INT);

CREATE VIEW mseed_data_sample_2005 AS SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_01 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_02 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_03 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_04 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_05 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_06 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_07 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_08 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_09 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_10 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_11 UNION SELECT * FROM mseed_data_sample_12;
SELECT ds.idata FROM mseed_catalog c JOIN mseed_data_sample_2005 ds ON c.mseed=ds.mseed WHERE c.starttime>'2005-01-19' AND c.starttime<'2005-01-21' LIMIT 1000;
key_bug_features: segmentation fault on select query with large data
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE mseed_catalog (starttime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, mseed INT CHECK (mseed >= 0));
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_13 (mseed INT, seqno INT, idata FLOAT, PRIMARY KEY (mseed, seqno));
INSERT INTO mseed_data_sample_13 (mseed, seqno, idata) VALUES (1, 1, 3.14), (1, 2, NULL), (2, 1, 2.71);
SELECT ds.idata FROM mseed_catalog c JOIN mseed_data_sample_13 ds ON c.mseed = ds.mseed WHERE c.starttime BETWEEN '2005-01-19' AND '2005-01-21' AND ds.idata IS NOT NULL LIMIT 500;
